product_results.title: LUCKY STEP Women's Retro Fashion Sneakers Thin Sole Casual Walking Lightweight Tennis Trainers Running Gym Workout Classic Comfortable Athletic Shoes

summary.text: Customers find these shoes super comfortable with no pain during wear. They describe the shoes as super cute and very cool in appearance. The fit is perfect and offers great value for the money. Customers consider them an excellent pair of shoes and a good product overall. However, customers have mixed opinions on sizing and foot support.

authors_reviews.title: Size up
authors_reviews.text: Size up! I found the toe box a little tight even though I sized up, but it stretched out after a few wears. Look cute.
authors_reviews.author: Chad

authors_reviews.title: Nice walking shoe
authors_reviews.text: I normally wear size 7 but I sized up to an 8 based on other customer reviews. I am glad I did because the fit is perfect. size 7 would have been too tight and small.
authors_reviews.author: Tallia

authors_reviews.title: Not the best shoes
authors_reviews.text: Fit on the smaller side, had an odd smell out of the box and the tag at the back was bigger and stuck out
authors_reviews.author: Hayley

authors_reviews.title: Small
authors_reviews.text: Great but small definitely size up!
authors_reviews.author: Blanche
